title: US auto tariffs come into effect today
bodyHtml:
A 25% additional tax on passenger cars and light trucks imported into the United States goes into effect today.

US President Trump's Decree No. 10908 and its annexes regarding additional tax have been announced. According to the Decree, which will be published in the US Federal Register dated April 3, 2025, an additional tax of 25% will be applied to the import of passenger cars in tariff position 8703, light trucks "with a gross weight not exceeding 5 tons" classified in tariff position 8704, and trucks that are powered only by electricity, in addition to all other applicable taxes.

In addition, an additional tax of 25% was imposed on 130 products  used as automotive parts.

The date of the additional tax application on automotive parts will be determined by the notifications to be made in the US Federal Register (May 3, 2025 at the latest).

Products on the relevant list that are not automotive parts will not be subject to additional tax.

 Click here for the Decision and its annexes to be published in the US Official Gazette.
